title: catevala bilineata
intro: Catevala bilineata, also known as the two-lined catawba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Catevala bilineata has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Catevala bilineata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from the plant's leaves, roots, or fruits, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
